name: 贪吃蛇
description: 经典贪吃蛇游戏，控制蛇移动吃掉食物增加长度，避免碰到墙壁和自身，支持设置难度
description_en: Classic Snake game. Control the snake to eat food and grow longer while avoiding walls and yourself. Supports difficulty settings

apis.name: startGame
apis.desc: 开始贪吃蛇游戏，可设置难度（1-3：简单/普通/困难），返回初始游戏状态
apis.desc_en: Start a new Snake game. Set difficulty (1-3: easy/normal/hard). Returns initial game state

apis.name: move
apis.desc: 控制蛇移动一步，方向为 up/down/left/right，返回移动后的游戏状态
apis.desc_en: Move the snake one step in the given direction (up/down/left/right). Returns updated game state

apis.name: getState
apis.desc: 获取当前游戏状态，包括蛇的位置、食物位置、得分、是否结束等
apis.desc_en: Get current game state including snake position, food position, score, game over status

apis.name: restart
apis.desc: 重新开始游戏，保持当前难度设置
apis.desc_en: Restart the game with current difficulty setting
